title: extract truncate_label() helper: 3 duplication sites in cert.rs/nvm.rs
description: cert_add_trusted(), nvm_add(), nvm_overwrite() all contain identical 3-line label-truncation: let label_len = label.len().min(24); let mut label_buf = [0u8; 24]; label_buf[..label_len].copy_from_slice(&label[..label_len]). Extract: fn truncate_label(label: &[u8]) -> ([u8; 24], usize). If truncation logic ever changes, one place to fix.
